name: Rumble Rush
author: Poki
description: Rumble Rush is a fast-paced multiplayer obstacle racing game. Play as a colorful racer diving, jumping, and dodging through wild courses full of tricky traps and surprises. Outsmart opponents using powerful power-up items and survive the chaos across different game modes! Collect coins and gems to unlock new skins and visual effects to customize your racer in Rumble Rush. In Block Survival, quick reflexes are key as you leap across moving blocks and avoid falling into the void. In Tournament Mode, race, dodge, and battle through knockout rounds to become the last racer standing. Play with friends in private party matches for even more chaotic fun! Whether you're speeding through obstacle courses or scrambling to survive collapsing arenas, every match is packed with unpredictable action and excitement. Ready to race, dodge, and rumble your way to victory? How to play Rumble Rush? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: use the mouse to adjust the camera angle Jump: the space bar Who created Rumble Rush? Rumble Rush is created by PocketHaven. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Rumble Rush for free? You can play Rumble Rush for free on Poki. Can I play Rumble Rush on mobile devices and desktop? Rumble Rush can be played on your computer. Can I play Rumble Rush with my friend? Yes! Rumble Rush is a multiplayer game so you can play it with your friends online!
